sessionStart.bash: ~/.claude/pet-data/bin/claude-status-pet write-status --adapter copilot --copilot-event sessionStart; if [ "$(node -pe 'try{JSON.parse(require("fs").readFileSync(process.env.HOME+"/.claude/pet-data/config.json","utf8")).auto_start}catch(e){false}' 2>/dev/null)" = 'true' ]; then SF=$(ls -t ~/.claude/pet-data/status-copilot-*.json 2>/dev/null | head -1); [ -n "$SF" ] && nohup ~/.claude/pet-data/bin/claude-status-pet run --status-file "$SF" --session-id "$(basename "$SF" .json | sed 's/status-//')" --assets-dir ~/.claude/pet-data/assets --debug >/dev/null 2>&1 & fi
sessionStart.powershell: & "$env:USERPROFILE\.claude\pet-data\bin\claude-status-pet-windows-x64.exe" write-status --adapter copilot --copilot-event sessionStart; $cfg="$env:USERPROFILE\.claude\pet-data\config.json"; $auto=$false; if(Test-Path $cfg){try{$c=Get-Content $cfg|ConvertFrom-Json;if($c.auto_start -eq $true){$auto=$true}}catch{}}; if($auto){$sf=Get-ChildItem "$env:USERPROFILE\.claude\pet-data\status-copilot-*.json" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue|Sort-Object LastWriteTime -Descending|Select-Object -First 1;if($sf){Start-Process -WindowStyle Hidden "$env:USERPROFILE\.claude\pet-data\bin\claude-status-pet-windows-x64.exe" -ArgumentList 'run','--status-file',$sf.FullName,'--session-id',$sf.BaseName.Replace('status-',''),'--assets-dir',"$env:USERPROFILE\.claude\pet-data\assets",'--debug'}}
